display_text: Mirror Shield, Cost: 0: Tier 3 neutral item with a passive Echo Shield effect. Blocks and reflects 75% of most targeted spells back to their caster once every 12 seconds. Provides no attribute bonuses. Stats: Block/Reflect CD: 12s, Reflect Chance: 75%.
